paragraphs.fullMatch: Whenever the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) adjusts the official cash rate, lenders typically pass this change onto variable rate home loans. Use this calculator to model how much your repayment will rise or fall.

paragraphs.fullMatch: If saving for a 20% deposit has felt like a never-ending struggle, you’re not alone. That’s why the First Home Guarantee (FHBG), backed by the Australian Government and administered by Housing Australia, could be your breakthrough into the property market. Under the guarantee, the government steps in to guarantee the difference between your 5% deposit and the standard 20% deposit.
paragraphs.text: If saving for a 20% deposit has felt like a never-ending struggle, you’re not alone. That’s why the First Home Guarantee (FHBG), backed by the Australian Government and administered by Housing Australia, could be your breakthrough into the property market. Under the guarantee, the government steps in to guarantee the difference between your 5% deposit and the standard 20% deposit.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Skip years of renting and saving. Leverage the government guarantee to purchase your home safely and cost-effectively today.
paragraphs.text: Skip years of renting and saving. Leverage the government guarantee to purchase your home safely and cost-effectively today.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) can cost anywhere from $10,000 to $30,000+, depending on your loan size. With the First Home Guarantee, that money stays back in your pocket.
paragraphs.text: Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) can cost anywhere from $10,000 to $30,000+, depending on your loan size. With the First Home Guarantee, that money stays back in your pocket.

paragraphs.text: Calculate your required deposit and see how much Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) you avoid paying under the scheme.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Accountants often have access to special home loan offers because lenders recognise their stable income, financial knowledge, and responsible money management. These benefits can include waived Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI), special interest rates, and flexible lending policies.
paragraphs.text: Accountants often have access to special home loan offers because lenders recognise their stable income, financial knowledge, and responsible money management. These benefits can include waived Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI), special interest rates, and flexible lending policies.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Jane is a CPA-registered accountant earning $130,000 a year as a salaried employee. Because of her stable job and professional registration, her lender offers her a home loan with a discounted interest rate and waived LMI, even though her deposit is just 10%.
paragraphs.text: Jane is a CPA-registered accountant earning $130,000 a year as a salaried employee. Because of her stable job and professional registration, her lender offers her a home loan with a discounted interest rate and waived LMI, even though her deposit is just 10%.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Normally, if your deposit is less than 20%, you pay Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI), which protects the lender if you can’t repay the loan. However, accountants registered with bodies like CPA Australia and earning over $120,000 can sometimes avoid LMI even with deposits as low as 10%.
paragraphs.text: Normally, if your deposit is less than 20%, you pay Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI), which protects the lender if you can’t repay the loan. However, accountants registered with bodies like CPA Australia and earning over $120,000 can sometimes avoid LMI even with deposits as low as 10%.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Mark is a self-employed accountant registered with CPA Australia. He wants to buy a $700,000 home. Normally, a 10% deposit ($70,000) would require LMI, but Mark qualifies for an LMI waiver because of his registration and income.

Her stable income also helps her get a loan amount that comfortably fits her budget.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Doctors and medical professionals, whether you’re a full-time salaried doctor, a casual medical practitioner, or self-employed running your own practice under an Australian Business Number (ABN), often have access to special home loan benefits. Lenders recognise the stable income, high earning potential, and lower risk profile of medical careers and provide tailored home loan options to reflect this.
paragraphs.text: Doctors and medical professionals, whether you’re a full-time salaried doctor, a casual medical practitioner, or self-employed running your own practice under an Australian Business Number (ABN), often have access to special home loan benefits. Lenders recognise the stable income, high earning potential, and lower risk profile of medical careers and provide tailored home loan options to reflect this.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Medical careers represent the lowest risk class for Australian banks. Enjoy these premium loan package enhancements:
paragraphs.text: Medical careers represent the lowest risk class for Australian banks. Enjoy these premium loan package enhancements:

paragraphs.fullMatch: Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) is a one-off insurance premium required if your deposit is below 20% of the property price. Many lenders waive LMI for doctors who meet criteria like being registered with a recognised medical board, having a stable income, and earning over $120,000 per year.
paragraphs.text: Lenders Mortgage Insurance (LMI) is a one-off insurance premium required if your deposit is below 20% of the property price. Many lenders waive LMI for doctors who meet criteria like being registered with a recognised medical board, having a stable income, and earning over $120,000 per year.

paragraphs.fullMatch: If you're buying a $700,000 home with a 5% deposit ($35,000), an LMI waiver could save you between $10,000 and $15,000 or more in upfront fees.
paragraphs.text: If you're buying a $700,000 home with a 5% deposit ($35,000), an LMI waiver could save you between $10,000 and $15,000 or more in upfront fees.

paragraphs.fullMatch: A non-resident home loan is designed for people living overseas or those who don’t hold Australian citizenship or permanent residency. This includes foreign nationals, temporary visa holders, and Australians living abroad. Since lenders view non-residents as higher-risk borrowers, they apply stricter criteria, including more documentation and often larger deposits than regular home loans.
paragraphs.text: A non-resident home loan is designed for people living overseas or those who don’t hold Australian citizenship or permanent residency. This includes foreign nationals, temporary visa holders, and Australians living abroad. Since lenders view non-residents as higher-risk borrowers, they apply stricter criteria, including more documentation and often larger deposits than regular home loans.

paragraphs.fullMatch: The Australian Government has introduced a two-year ban on foreign persons purchasing established (previously owned) residential properties. This ban applies from 1 April 2025 to 31 March 2027 and aims to improve housing affordability.
paragraphs.text: The Australian Government has introduced a two-year ban on foreign persons purchasing established (previously owned) residential properties. This ban applies from 1 April 2025 to 31 March 2027 and aims to improve housing affordability.

paragraphs.fullMatch:
<motion.p variants={premiumFadeUp} className="text-slate-500 text-[14.5px] leading-relaxed mb-6">
                Refinancing your home loan is like upgrading your car or utility bill to a better rate without changing address. If your mortgage is more than two years old, or your financial position has changed, you could be paying a large interest premium to your bank. Here's how we help you switch lenders to save.
              </motion.p>
paragraphs.text: Refinancing your home loan is like upgrading your car or utility bill to a better rate without changing address. If your mortgage is more than two years old, or your financial position has changed, you could be paying a large interest premium to your bank. Here's how we help you switch lenders to save.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Refinancing can save you thousands over the life of your loan. We help you compare your current loan with better options from a range of lenders so you can make an informed choice.
paragraphs.text: Refinancing can save you thousands over the life of your loan. We help you compare your current loan with better options from a range of lenders so you can make an informed choice.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Refinancing can come with some setup and settlement costs. We work with you to work out the total costs upfront and compare them against your repayments savings to make sure it is a profitable move.
paragraphs.text: Refinancing can come with some setup and settlement costs. We work with you to work out the total costs upfront and compare them against your repayments savings to make sure it is a profitable move.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Refinancing can save you thousands – but only if you avoid these common traps. We help you look at the full picture, not just the advertised interest rate.
paragraphs.text: Refinancing can save you thousands – but only if you avoid these common traps. We help you look at the full picture, not just the advertised interest rate.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Are you financially ready to switch lenders and secure a better deal? Tap the checklist options below to assess your current refinancing readiness.
paragraphs.text: Are you financially ready to switch lenders and secure a better deal? Tap the checklist options below to assess your current refinancing readiness.

paragraphs.fullMatch: Annualising Year-to-Date (YTD) income is the standard method used by Australian banks to assess casual, part-time, and self-employed applicants. Use this tool to predict your lender-assessable income.
